meta_description: Hangzhou Kahn Carboxymethyl Starch (CMS) applications in textile printing, water-based coatings, wallpaper adhesive, paper dyeing, construction materials, and desiccant gel

hero.title: CMS Application Fields
hero.subtitle: Professional carboxymethyl starch products widely used in textile, coating, construction, papermaking and other industrial fields

textile.title: Textile Printing & Dyeing
textile.description: Used as printing paste and dyeing thickener for excellent printing effects
detail_content: CMS plays a crucial role in textile printing and dyeing.
In printing processes, it provides appropriate viscosity.
In dyeing processes, it controls dye liquor fluidity.

construction.title: Construction Materials
detail_content: CMS is used in construction materials as water retention agent.
In putty powder, it delays water evaporation.
In gypsum materials, it improves fluidity.

coating.title: Water-Based Coatings
coating.description: Thickener to improve coating rheology and stability
detail_content: CMS serves as thickener and rheology modifier.

wallpaper.title: Wallpaper Adhesive
detail_content: CMS is core component of wallpaper adhesive powder.

paper.title: Paper Dyeing
detail_content: CMS is used as surface sizing agent.
It improves dye uptake and uniformity.

desiccant.title: Desiccant Gel
detail_content: CMS locks absorbed moisture into stable gel.
The product is safe to use.

cta.title: Need More Application Solutions?
cta.description: Our professional team is ready to provide CMS application solutions
